# U.Psy

> U.Psy is Morocco's performance psychology platform — find accredited psychologists, take clinical self-assessments, and access tailored mental health programs.

U.Psy connects individuals, athletes, and organizations with accredited psychologists across Morocco. The platform offers evidence-based clinical services (CBT, EMDR, Schema Therapy, ACT), validated self-assessments (GAD-7, PHQ-9), and B2B programs for workplace mental health.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview, featured psychologists, and self-assessment entry points.
- [About](/about): Mission, clinical approach, and team.
- [Founder](/founder): Mehdi Felji, founder of U.Psy.
- [Services](/services): Clinical services including CBT, EMDR, Schema Therapy, and assessments.
- [Consulting for Organizations](/services/consulting-for-organizations): Workplace mental health programs.
- [Find a Psychologist](/psychologists): Directory of accredited psychologists in Morocco.
- [Get Matched](/get-matched): Guided matching with a psychologist.
- [Assessment Lab](/assessment-lab): Clinical self-assessments (GAD-7, PHQ-9, and more).
- [Free Score](/free-score): Quick free mental wellbeing score.
- [Learn](/learn): Courses and learning paths.
- [Resources](/resources): Articles, guides, worksheets, and toolkits.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on mental health, therapy, and wellbeing.
- [For Athletes](/for-athletes): Sport psychology programs.
- [For Organizations](/for-organizations): B2B mental health offerings.
- [Moroccan Umbrella](/moroccan-umbrella): National network of accredited Moroccan psychologists.
- [Psychologues Sans Frontières](/psf): Humanitarian psychology sub-brand.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the U.Psy team.

## Optional

- [Legal & Privacy](/legal): Terms and Moroccan Law 09-08 privacy notice.
- [Brand Guidelines](/brand)
- [Pricing for Specialists](/pricing-specialists)
